concerns.text: US-1 (End-to-end data acquisition & pairing) has no Success Criteria backing it. Per requirements coverage rules, every story must have at least one SC. Consider adding SCs for data download success (e.g., 'Downloaded files match expected checksums' or 'All GEO series IDs return valid expression matrices').

US-2 (Feature selection & preprocessing) has no Success Criteria backing it. Per requirements coverage rules, every story must have at least one SC. Consider adding SCs for feature selection (e.g., 'Selected features map to ≥75% of known defense pathway genes' or 'Zero-variance genes are filtered with documented count').

FR-007 (Bonferroni correction) has no user story anchor. It states '(Methodological soundness – multiplicity)' but doesn't reference a story. Re-anchor to US-3 (predictive modelling & evaluation) since statistical validation is part of the modelling workflow, or remove if not needed.
